goal: Implement the Ultimate Memory Layer Roadmap: 7 features across 4 phases (complete) + Phase 5 Knowledge Intelligence across 6 sub-phases — graph intelligence, temporal truth, reflective memory, core memory & domain shaping, entity intelligence, and advanced capabilities. Source of truth: docs/ULTIMATE_MEMORY_LAYER_ROADMAP.md (Phases 1-4), docs/PHASE_5_ROADMAP.md (Phase 5).

tasks.desc: Combined Phase 5 schema migration: add provenance VARCHAR DEFAULT 'inferred' and confidence REAL DEFAULT 0.8 to associations table; add valid_from INTEGER, valid_until INTEGER, rationale TEXT, tags TEXT to knowledge table; add rationale TEXT to playbooks table. Apply across SQLite, Postgres, and in-memory adapters.
acceptance_criteria: Schema version bumped in src/adapters/sqlite/schema.ts
SQLite migration adds all columns with correct types and defaults
Postgres schema.sql includes all new columns with correct types and defaults
In-memory adapter types updated to include all new optional fields
Existing associations default to provenance='inferred', confidence=0.8
All new knowledge/playbook columns are nullable
Existing tests still pass

tasks.desc: Core discover module: betweenness centrality over association graph, cross-class bridge detection (edges connecting different knowledge_class groups), composite surprise scoring (cross-class bonus, cross-scope bonus, low-to-high-degree bonus, weak-confidence bonus), explanation generation for each surprise result.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/discover.ts with discover() async function
Betweenness centrality computed over association graph to identify bridge nodes
Cross-class bridges detected and scored with composite formula
Each SurpriseResult includes human-readable explanation of why it is surprising
Computation bounded: configurable max graph traversal depth, max results cap
Read-only analysis — no mutations to knowledge or associations
Unit tests in src/__tests__/discover.test.ts

tasks.desc: Core edge provenance: update autoDetectAssociations to tag output as provenance='inferred' with computed confidence; update explicit addAssociation to default to provenance='extracted', confidence=1.0. Backward-compatible: existing associations without provenance treated as inferred/0.8.
acceptance_criteria: autoDetectAssociations tags new associations as inferred with computed confidence
addAssociation defaults to extracted/1.0 for explicitly created associations
Existing associations without provenance treated as inferred/0.8
Association type ontology unchanged (related_to, supports, contradicts, etc.)
Existing association tests still pass

tasks.desc: Core temporal extraction: update extraction pipeline to detect temporal language ('starting Monday', 'as of Q3', 'until the migration completes', 'effective March 1st') and populate valid_from/valid_until on extracted knowledge facts. Conservative: only populate when text is unambiguous.
acceptance_criteria: Extraction pipeline detects unambiguous temporal language in source text
valid_from populated when text indicates a start date
valid_until populated when text indicates an end date
Ambiguous temporal references are not populated (conservative extraction)
Facts without temporal language have null validity windows (behave as before)
Unit tests covering various temporal language patterns

tasks.desc: Core getFactsAt: fast temporal query that filters by valid_from <= timestamp AND (valid_until IS NULL OR valid_until > timestamp). Falls back to existing getContextAt() replay when validity windows are not set. Returns FactsAtResult with usedFastPath indicator.
acceptance_criteria: getFactsAt(timestamp, options?) function implemented in src/core/temporal.ts
Fast path: SQL/filter by validity windows when present
Fallback: delegates to getContextAt() replay when windows not set
FactsAtResult.usedFastPath correctly indicates which path was taken
Does not remove or replace existing temporal replay system
Unit tests in src/__tests__/temporal-query.test.ts for fast path, fallback, and mixed

tasks.desc: Core reflection module: reflectOnKnowledge() reads recent working memory summaries + active knowledge + active playbooks, runs extractor over combined text looking for recurring themes, implicit constraints, emerging strategies, and cross-session connections. Produces new knowledge tagged source='reflection' with provisional trust status.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/reflection.ts with reflectOnKnowledge() async function
Reads and combines: recent summaries, active knowledge, active playbooks
Runs extractor over combined text for pattern detection
New facts tagged with source: 'reflection' evidence type
Reflection-sourced facts start as provisional (lower initial trust than extraction)
Clearly separated from existing episodic reflect() API
Rate-limiting support via rateLimitKey option
Unit tests in src/__tests__/reflection.test.ts

tasks.desc: Core getCoreMemory: builds token-budgeted bundle from identity facts (trusted, knowledge_class='identity'), active constraints, workspace norms, active work items, and top active playbook. Deterministic ordering: identity → constraints → norms → work → playbook. Overflow trims by class priority, keeping identity and constraints.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/core-memory.ts with getCoreMemory() async function
Bundle built from existing getProfile() and getContext() internals — not a new storage layer
Deterministic section ordering: identity, constraints, norms, work, playbook
Token budget cap (default 1500) enforced with overflow trimming by class priority
Identity and constraints preserved even when over budget
Stable across turns within a session (cacheable)
Unit tests in src/__tests__/core-memory.test.ts

tasks.desc: Core alias resolution: config-driven canonical name mapping applied during extraction. Before deduplication, extracted entity names resolved against AliasMap. Matched entities get canonical name; unmatched pass through unchanged. Creates extracted associations between canonical entity and alias occurrence contexts.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/aliases.ts with resolveAliases() and alias management functions
AliasMap config accepted on MemoryManagerConfig (optional)
Extraction pipeline applies alias resolution before deduplication
Canonical names replace alias variants in extracted facts
Extracted associations link canonical entities to alias occurrence contexts
System works identically without alias config
Unit tests in src/__tests__/aliases.test.ts

tasks.desc: Core memory bundles: exportBundle() creates named, versioned collection of knowledge facts and playbooks filtered by scope/tags/class. importBundle() merges bundle into target scope with conflict resolution via existing trust pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/bundles.ts with exportBundle() and importBundle() functions
exportBundle filters by scope, tags, knowledge class per BundleExportOptions
importBundle resolves conflicts using existing trust pipeline
Bundle is portable (JSON-serializable) with version metadata
Bundles can be workspace-scoped or tenant-scoped for sharing
Unit tests in src/__tests__/bundles.test.ts for export, import, and conflict resolution

tasks.desc: Core incremental corpus refresh: refreshDocuments() re-ingests only documents whose content hash has changed since last ingestion. Selective fact invalidation marks facts linked to changed documents for re-extraction. Unchanged documents and their facts left untouched.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/corpus-refresh.ts with refreshDocuments() function
Compares current content hashes against stored hashes from document ingestion
Only re-ingests documents with changed content
Facts linked to changed documents marked for re-extraction
Unchanged documents and their facts left untouched
Unit tests for change detection, selective re-ingestion, and fact invalidation

tasks.desc: Core graph report: getGraphReport() produces compact orientation artifact combining top 5 discover surprises, top 5 lint issues, top 10 high-degree knowledge facts, knowledge gaps, active contradictions, recent changes summary, and soon-to-expire temporal facts. Token-budgeted under 2000 tokens.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/graph-report.ts with getGraphReport() function
Calls discover() and lint internally for data aggregation
Combines sections: surprises, issues, high-degree facts, gaps, contradictions, changes, expiring
Total output under 2000 tokens (configurable via GraphReportOptions.tokenBudget)
Structured markdown suitable for system prompt injection
Top 5/5/10 limits enforced per section
Unit tests in src/__tests__/graph-report.test.ts

tasks.desc: Core time-aware formatting: context assembly appends temporal qualifiers to time-bounded facts ('Valid until 2026-09-30', 'In effect starting 2026-04-01'). Markdown export renders validity windows in fact metadata. Only qualifies facts with explicit validity windows.
acceptance_criteria: Context assembly includes concise temporal qualifiers for time-bounded facts
Markdown export shows validity windows in fact metadata sections
Facts without validity windows render exactly as before (no qualifiers added)
Qualifiers are concise — one short suffix, not a paragraph
Existing formatter and export tests still pass

tasks.desc: Core rationale capture: update extraction pipeline to detect causal language ('because', 'in order to', 'the reason is', 'this ensures') and populate rationale field on extracted knowledge facts and playbooks. Conservative: only populate when text clearly explains reasoning.
acceptance_criteria: Extraction pipeline detects causal language patterns in source text
rationale field populated on knowledge facts when causal language found
rationale field populated on playbooks when reasoning is present
Ambiguous causal references are not populated (conservative extraction)
learnFact() and createPlaybook() accept optional rationale parameter

tasks.desc: Core context assembly provenance weighting: update association expansion during context assembly to prefer high-confidence edges. Confidence influences retrieval ranking but does not gate inclusion — all associations included, ordered by confidence.
acceptance_criteria: Context assembly's association expansion weights results by edge confidence
High-confidence (extracted) edges ranked above low-confidence (inferred) edges
No edges excluded solely by confidence — all included but ordered

tasks.desc: Core derived pipeline framework: produces typed outputs from reflection results — playbook candidates from repeated workflows, coding rule candidates from repeated constraints, anti-pattern candidates from failure patterns, project summaries from trusted hub facts. Each output is a draft requiring confirmation before trust pipeline promotion.
acceptance_criteria: New file src/core/derived.ts with derive() function

Each output carries provenance back to source knowledge IDs

Pipeline framework extensible for custom derivation types
Clearly separated from reflection pass (reflection discovers, derivation materializes)

tasks.desc: Core custom facets: add tag filtering to retrieval search options, tag-based groupBy in markdown export, tag scoping in lint and graph report analysis. Tags are freeform strings supplementing knowledge_class, not replacing it.

tasks.desc: Core incremental alias discovery: during reflection pass, compare entity names across knowledge facts using normalized string similarity. Surface high-similarity pairs as AliasCandidate merge suggestions for operator confirmation. Conservative threshold to minimize false positives.

tasks.desc: Core curation view: getCurationSummary() aggregates recent actions from maintenance (retired, expired, demoted), reflection (new patterns, promoted facts), ontology (merged entities, resolved aliases), and derived pipelines (produced candidates).
